name: Cloud 9 Virtual Golf
about: Cloud 9 Virtual Golf is an indoor golf facility led by Kevin Cloud, a PGA professional with over 25 years of coaching experience. The venue specializes in high-quality instruction and club fitting for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to scratch players. Recognized as a U.S. Kids Golf Top 50 Coach, Cloud utilizes the facility to offer comprehensive lessons, a college prep team, and professional club fitting services with major brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and Titleist. The facility utilizes virtual golf technology to provide a controlled environment for game improvement and analysis throughout the year.
why_golfers_like_it: Instruction from a PGA Professional with 25+ years experience
Professional club fitting available for top brands
Specialized college prep team and junior programs
U.S. Kids Golf Top 50 Coach recognition
Virtual golf simulators for year-round practice

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, Cloud 9 is an experienced club-fitter for major brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and Mizuno, so they likely have options available for use or fitting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue focuses on training and retail. You should contact them directly regarding their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator takes approximately 45 to 60 minutes, though this may vary based on the software used and your pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Cloud 9 is very kid-friendly, featuring a College Prep Team and a coach recognized as a U.S. Kids Golf Top 50 Instructor.
